features: Lock in hydration with our lightweight Ceramide Blemish Gel Moisturiser
Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, Salicylic Acid & Niacinamide, our moisturiser helps soothe and strengthen the skin barrier
This product works to prevent moisture loss and diminish the appearance of excess sebum to promote a healthy, matte skin finish
description: Product Description Your Skin Barrier Complex Lock in hydration with our lightweight Ceramide Blemish Gel Moisturiser. Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, Salicylic Acid & Niacinamide, our moisturiser helps soothe and strengthen the skin barrier. This product works to prevent moisture loss and diminish the appearance of excess sebum to promote a healthy, matte skin finish. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Hydroxypropyl Cyclodextrin, Stearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Niacinamide, Cetyl Alcohol, Salicylic Acid, Ceramide NP, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, PEG-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Benzoate, Cyclohexane, Hydrogenated Lecithin Safety Warning Use only as directed. If product gets into eyes, rinse with water. Manufacturer Contact Information Produced for: Quest Personal Care Global Ltd, M27 8FF, UK.
